purpose: First script-driven categorization and lightweight quality gate for Ethan-provided Salt coarse/medium/fine mesh-family folders before staging, registry updates, GCI calculation, or closure-correlation retry.

admission_summary.salt2_jin: Medium and fine pass the lightweight gate; coarse is held for reconciliation with the repo mainline continuation before GCI use.
admission_summary.salt4_jin: Endpoint QoIs are summarized, but medium/fine tail with signal-15/no clean convergenceMonitor evidence in this gate and require continuation or a later admission decision.
admission_summary.kirst_policy: Inventoried and labeled as historical provenance only; do not use as current mainline closure evidence unless a future dated task explicitly re-admits Kirst.
admission_summary.secondary_jin_policy: Salt 1 and Salt 3 Jin mesh families remain inventory-only in this pass.

monitor_summary_policy: Large postProcessing monitor files are parsed from a bounded tail window of the latest restart segment. The summaries are screening signals, not full-history reconstructions.
